headline: On the Line for Lung Health: Telephone Training Helps COPD Patients Perfect Inhaler Use
summary: LOUISVILLE, Ky., April 15, 2026--A new study published in the Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Diseases: Journal of the COPD Foundation shows how an innovative phone-based inhaler education program helped Medicare Advantage beneficiaries with COPD use their inhalers more effectively.
